articles.title: Control Resonant Hands-On: An Action-RPG Built On Creepypasta - Kotaku

articles.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved PS5 players will require an Xbox account and gamertag to play – as well as PS Plus to play split-screen co-op - Eurogamer
articles.description: Players will require an Xbox account and an Xbox gamertag to Halo: Campaign Evolved on PS5.

articles.title: Ubisoft Co-Founder Killed in France Plane Crash - Insider Gaming
articles.description: Claude Guillemot, one of the co-founders of Ubisoft, has been killed in a plane crash in France, it has been confirmed.

articles.title: Has your Pixel battery life improved after updating to Android 17? [Poll] - 9to5Google
articles.description: Have you noticed your Pixel's battery life improve since updating to Android 17?

articles.title: SwitchBot’s Standing Circulator Fan is worth fighting for - The Verge
articles.description: SwitchBot’s Standing Circulator Fan looks okay, is quiet, runs for hours on battery, has a nightlight, and transforms from a desktop to standing fan in seconds.

articles.title: PlayStation May Be Interested in Buying Xbox and Bethesda Studio - comicbook.com
articles.description: PlayStation may be interested in buying an Xbox and Bethesda studio following reports Xbox is about to have a "reset."
